Internal Compliance Note — DPDPA and PIT controls for Navajyot Precision Limited (INEX-listed); circulation: Board Risk Committee, Compliance, Treasury.
Per India DPDPA, personal data is any data about an individual who is identifiable by or in relation to such data; treat child data (<18 years) with verifiable parental consent and purpose limitation.
MNPI scope: Any unpublished price-sensitive information relating to our listed securities (e.g., draft Q1 FY27 revenue, capex approvals) under the Indian securities regulator’s PIT Regulations; trading windows remain closed until board disclosure.
Incident review: On 24-05-2026 14:35 IST, Mr. Raghav Menon (DOB 12-08-1988), Deputy Treasurer at Navajyot Precision Limited, accessed "NPL_Q1FY27-Provisional.pptx" via device NPL-iOS-7F3C (IMEI masked: ****9910) from Chennai (IP 2405:ac00:7f3c::a921).
The same session (ID: NPL-SEC-2026-142) auto-synced to his work email r.menon@navajyotprecision.in and triggered a finance data export to account alias "TREAS-OPS-CHN-04" at 14:41; this cluster constitutes a high MNPI risk with linked quasi-identifiers.
Quasi-identifiers observed for Mr. Menon include role (Deputy Treasurer), location (Chennai, TN), device fingerprint (iOS 16.5, NPL-iOS-7F3C), corporate account alias (TREAS-OPS-CHN-04), calendar tag "Ops-Rev", and last-4 Aadhaar captured for KYE revalidation (**** 4821).
No full Aadhaar/PAN was processed; only masked PAN (****-****-Q) and GSTIN of a vendor sandbox profile (XVZ00TEST0000Z0) were referenced for reconciliation without storing raw IDs.
DPDPA actions: as data fiduciary, confirm consent logs for finance personnel data, refresh privacy notice (EN/HI), and ensure children's data in the apprentice portal (ages 16–17) are collected only with signed guardian e-consent and age gating.
PIT actions: restrict access to provisional financials to the "designated persons" list; Mr. Menon remains a designated person and must acknowledge the insider list entry and the trading window closure for 20 days post-board meeting.
We note a benign dataset excerpt — "Bengaluru, Android user, male, DOB 05-01-1999" — that is not linked to any named individual in our systems and should not be treated as identifiable without additional signals.
Another unlinked example: "Senior engineer, Pune office, device serial A1-DA-0007, shift 09:00–18:00" appears in a generic productivity report; absent a name or account mapping, treat as non-identifying for DPDPA but still minimize retention.
Do not collect full Aadhaar numbers, PAN, or UPI handles in internal chats; if necessary, use last-4 only and approved redaction (e.g., UPI VPA masked r***v@npbank) and store in the secure vault with purpose tags.
Any communication about draft earnings, plant utilisation, or undisclosed orders must be through approved channels; personal emails or unmanaged devices (e.g., private laptops) are prohibited for MNPI handling.
For queries or incident escalation, contact the Compliance Desk at compliance@navajyotprecision.in; record incident IDs in the logbook referencing IN-PIT-2026-CHN-07.
